name: Cantabria (Spain)

colors.symbolism: the maritime colours of the historic Province of Santander
the maritime colours of the historic Province of Santander

description: Two equal horizontal stripes of white over red.
history: Adopted by Law 9/1984 of 22 December as the official flag of the Autonomous Community of Cantabria. The white-and-red bicolour comes from the merchant marine ensign granted to the Province of Santander by King Charles III on 1 August 1845.

features.symbolism: The white and red are taken from the maritime ensign of the Province of Santander, granted by Charles III in 1845 to vessels from the Cantabrian coast.
